title: Jina Reranker: open weights + hosted API review | reranker.uk
description: Jina Reranker review: open-weight cross-encoders with a hosted API. Covers jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual, jina-reranker-v1-tiny-en (browser-runnable), benchmarks, pricing, and Python usage.
og_title: Jina Reranker — open weights + hosted API
og_description: The only major reranker family that offers both open weights and a hosted API, including a tiny model that runs in the browser.
